top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 93, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
88ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
At Gran Fondo Sibiu, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Gran Fondo Sibiu's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before July.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Gran Fondo Sibiu. Train it until it feels boring.
Gran Fondo Sibiu's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 93 miles.
8,202ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 93 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
8,202ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
The aerobic base that lets you ride mixed terrain at tempo for 93 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
Low-cadence force work for 8,202ft of climbing. The slow, grinding ascents where you can't spin—you push.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 93 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.

race_overlay.heat: July in Sibiu, Transylvania, Romania can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Gran Fondo Sibiu. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Gran Fondo Sibiu’s 93 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Gran Fondo Sibiu. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Gran Fondo Sibiu requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, TT Threshold, and Over Under to prepare you for 93 miles of mixed terrain in Sibiu, Transylvania, Romania.
